Reference¶

    • Contents:
      • configfile — Configuration file tools

      • date — Date manipulation

      • index — Indexing data using flexible multiple criteria

      • json — Conversion to and from json

      • truthparser — Parsing Boolean expressions
      • tools — Micellaneous language tools
  • directive — A class enhancing python dictionaries
    • Contents:
      • Introduction
      • The Directive class — Handling users’ requests
      • The JSonFile class — Reading json encoded dictionaries
  • language — Language definition and analysis utilities
    • Contents:
      • Introduction
      • Language definition
      • The Language class — Language validation
      • The LanguageDefinition class — Validating the language definition
  • netcdf — Reading and slicing netCDF files
    • Contents:
      • The File class — reading and slicing netCDF files
  • observations — Handling observations
    • Contents:
      • The Observation class — Holding an observation array
      • The ObsFilter class — Filtering observations
  • services — Client-Server utilities
    • Contents:
      • Introduction
      • The Services module — Client-Server tools
  • slicing — Slicing multi-dimensional arrays
    • Contents:
      • Introduction
      • The Slice class — Slicing netCDF variables and arrays
      • The ArrayGenerator class — Creating numpy arrays
      • The Slice to Array Visitor — Slicing into a multi-dimensional array
      • The Slice to List Visitor — Slicing into a collection of multi-dimensional arrays
      • Dimensions — Different classes to handle different kinds of dimensions
      • CF10 — Implementing dimensions for CF 1.0 compliant files
